summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LCARS Knowledge Database - Backend APIs working perfectly (93.3% success), frontend LCARS UI functioning well, but found one critical security vulnerability in frontend routing

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 on article creation

critical_bugs.issue: No role-based access control in page rendering - Nummer Eins can access ArticleEditor directly
critical_bugs.security_impact: Nummer Eins (reader role) can access Article Editor UI (should be Captain only)

passed_tests: Captain P and Nummer Eins login successful
Dashboard stats showing correct counts (6+ articles, 5 categories)
All 5 categories present (TROUBLESHOOTING, ANLEITUNG, PROZESS, KONFIGURATION, AUFZEICHNUNG)
Article retrieval and search functionality working
Backend API authorization correctly blocks Nummer Eins from creating articles (403)
AI Computer Chat working with Claude integration
Navigation menu correctly hides LOGBUCH for Nummer Eins
Knowledge Base article viewing with Markdown rendering
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL SECURITY FIX REQUIRED: Add role-based access control in App.js renderPage function. Nummer Eins should not be able to access ArticleEditor page even via direct navigation. Backend API security is working correctly (returns 403), but frontend needs protection.
